metadata.notes: All product names, vendor lines, and color names are real and verified via web research. SKUs are real where found in search results (e.g., COREtec VV-series, Mannington MPB/MAX-series, Caesarstone 4-digit codes, Amerock BP-series, Top Knobs M/TK-series, SW/BM color codes, Behr PPU codes). Some SKUs are approximate model identifiers where exact retail SKUs vary by size/format. Focused on Texas/San Antonio market availability from major national vendors with regional distribution. Style context: Warm Transitional palette with natural wood, brass/gold accents, and organic textures.
